'''Crockagor''' was a member of a [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], he served the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Crockagor fought and [[Death/Legends|died]] as a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] in [[the Cauldron]] arena on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]].

==Biography==
Crockagor was a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] who served the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].<ref name="USB" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and Dooku's [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Crockagor fought in a [[Mission to Rattatak|ritual battle]] to determine Dooku's new [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] at the arena known as [[the Cauldron]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. During the fight,<ref name="CW" /> he<ref name="USB" /> faced off against the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] gladiator<ref name="CW" /> [[Krutch]],<ref name="USB" /> whom he attempted to crush with his mace, only for the other fighter to block the blow with his [[Shield (physical armor)/Legends|shield]]. Krutch then ensnared Crockagor with a net and attacked him with a spiked [[Club/Legends|club]],<ref name="CW" /> following which Crockagor was [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="USB" />

==Personality and traits==
Crockagor belonged to a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with [[Color/Legends|green]], [[Hair/Legends|hairless]], spiny skin and green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. The species was [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], with a horn on each [[Limb/Legends|limb]], three digits on each hand, and four digits on each foot.<ref name="CW" /> They also possessed [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Crockagor served Dooku loyally, always carrying out his master's bidding.<ref name="USB" />

==Equipment==
Crockagor wore a brown [[loincloth]] and fought with a brown and black spiked mace while in the Cauldron arena.<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Crockagor<ref name="USB" /> first appeared as an unnamed background character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The character was later given a name in ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', a sticker book written by [[Simon Beecroft]] and released in [[2004]].<ref name="DK">{{DK|url=us/9780756607593-ultimate-sticker-book-star-wars-clone-wars|text=Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars|nolive=1}}</ref> However, in later sources, Crockagor's backstory was not revealed.
